fix: restrict group collapse/expand to chevron click only

Prevent accidental collapse when clicking elsewhere on the group
header (e.g. after editing a cell). Only the chevron arrow button
triggers toggle now.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: minimal type-aware empty states for all editable cells

Replace verbose "Cliquer pour modifier..." with quiet type-specific
indicators: dash for text/number, persistent icons for date/phone/
email/location, muted User icon without text, "—" for empty selects.
Icons always visible as anchors so empty→filled transition is smooth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: replace DossierFilters with ColumnFilters on dossiers page

Extract matchesFilter to shared utility, update dossiers page to use
the same per-column filtering system as board pages. Remove old
DossierFilters component (status + date range only) in favor of
ColumnFilters (type-aware operators for all column types).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: add dark/light theme system with next-themes

Install next-themes, add ThemeProvider + ThemeToggle, define CSS
design tokens for both modes in globals.css, migrate ~1500 hardcoded
colors to semantic tokens across all components. Sidebar is light in
light mode, dark navy in dark mode. All color-coded elements (badges,
file types, status indicators) use dark: variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

findRelacionadas, conteoCategoriasEditoriales, calcularTiempoLectura

AdminNoticiaController (CRUD + cambiar estado + destacar)

sidebar (últimas + categorías editoriales), filtros por categoría,
noticia individual con Schema.org NewsArticle, Open Graph, compartir
en redes, noticias relacionadas

Admin: tabla con cambio de estado inline, destacar, CRUD con
formulario (título, bajada, contenido, categoría editorial, autor,
estado, publicación programada, foto destacada)

SeoHelper: schemaNewsArticle para JSON-LD

S3: sección Patrimonio y Cultura

Ruta /patrimonio filtra negocios de categorías patrimonio y
educacion-cultura. Enlace agregado al menú de navegación.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

S3: módulo directorio — negocios, categorías, mapa, admin CRUD

Modelos: Categoria, Negocio (findBySlug, findActivos, findDestacados,
buscar, findParaMapa), Plan

Controllers públicos: Categoría (index/show), Negocio (index/show/turismo),
Mapa, Buscar, API negocios.json para Leaflet

Admin: AdminNegocioController CRUD completo (crear, editar, eliminar,
verificar) con CSRF, sanitización y auditoría

Helpers: SlugHelper, SeoHelper (meta tags, Schema.org, Open Graph),
ImageHelper (upload, resize, WebP)

Vistas: layout público con nav y branding (DM Serif Display + Source Sans 3),
layout admin con sidebar, grids de categorías, cards de negocios, ficha
completa con mapa Leaflet, reseñas, WhatsApp, buscador con filtros,
mapa interactivo pantalla completa

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix JSON smart quotes breaking website rendering

Smart/curly quotes in JSON structure keys caused parse failure.
Regenerated articles.json with clean straight quotes via Python.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix+debug: corregir race condition en refresh post-upload de logo

Root cause: refreshMe({ force: true }) borraba refreshPromiseRef pero
apiFetch tenía su propio Map inFlight a nivel de módulo. Si había un
GET /auth/me en vuelo al momento del upload, refresh() recibía la
respuesta vieja (pre-upload) y sobreescribía auth.jewelry.logoUrl y
el favicon con datos stale.

Fix: pasar dedupe: !force en apiFetch dentro de refreshMe, de modo que
force=true fuerza una request HTTP nueva en lugar de reusar la en-vuelo.

Logs temporales agregados [DBG LOGO] en:
- usePerfilJoyeria (1, 2, 5): resp del upload y dispatch del evento
- AuthContext (3a, 4): listener onLogoChanged y resultado de refreshMe
- Sidebar (3b): listener onLogoChanged
- auth.favicon (3c): applyAuthFaviconOverrideLogo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix profile existence check: remove expires_at filter, lightweight global query

Root cause: All profile queries filtered by expires_at > now(), but profiles
have 24h TTL so 500 built profiles appeared as "not built". Fixed by:
- Removing expires_at filter from all queries in both components
- Global query fetches only entity_name (not huge profile JSONB)
- Full profile data loaded on-demand when user clicks View
- BatchEntityBuilder also fixed (same expires_at issue)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

SWR mode rente : utiliser rendementNetDrag au lieu du rendement brut

Le taux de retrait (SWR) utilisait rendement - inflation, mais le drag fiscal IS
(forfait TME + IS revenus SCPI) est déjà soustrait du capital chaque année dans
la boucle. Double ponction → érosion du patrimoine. Corrige en utilisant
rendementNetDrag - inflation. Fixe aussi les ReferenceError sur resteSASU
(déclaration avant initialisation).

commit.message:
refactor(events): unify event routing with resolve_routing and explicit target fields

Replace ad-hoc routing logic scattered across Telegram/Web handlers with
a centralized resolve_routing() function in events.py. Event envelope now
carries explicit target_session_id and target_channel fields so subscribers
no longer infer routing from source_type or session_id string format.

Also removes redundant deferred_result mailbox deposit (P3) since the
result is already in history_messages.

- Change Windows title bar from blue to dark grey to match app background

commit.message:
fix(3D): increase altitude scale for visual clarity

Aircraft altitude was barely visible (scale 0.05). Increased to 0.15
for 3x exaggeration so altitude differences are clearly visible:

- Ground (0 ft) → Y = 5
- 1,000 ft → Y = 50
- 5,000 ft → Y = 234
- 10,000 ft → Y = 462

Added ALTITUDE_SCALE constant with documentation explaining the
exaggeration vs real scale.

commit.message:
Enhance Domain 1 content with exam-specific technical depth

- Remove score references from homepage and dashboard
- Add chunking strategy details: hierarchical (1000/500 tokens),
  semantic (FM-powered, costs extra), fixed-size (512/20% overlap)
- Add Rerank API details: Amazon Rerank 1.0, Cohere Rerank 3.5
- Add Titan V2 specs: 1024 dims default, flexible 256/512/1024,
  dimension accuracy tradeoffs (512=99%, 256=97%)
- Add Guardrails policy types: content filters, PII, grounding
- Add Textract APIs: AnalyzeDocument, AnalyzeExpense, AnalyzeID
- Add deployment patterns: batch inference, provisioned throughput
- Expand Well-Architected GenAI Lens guidance

- Remove APP-META/ directory and GitHub Actions workflow

- Fix typos: mkdri→mkdir (postgresql), double https (grpc), broken repo URL (pytorch)
- Convert Obsidian WikiLinks to standard Markdown in docker.md
- Normalize H1 titles: ClickHouse, Elasticsearch, HAProxy, Lima
- Clean up frontmatter: remove invalid icons and emoji

fix: audit P3 — 24 fixes across observability, performance, security, tests (#552)

Observability (7): debug_span! on parse_markdown_chunks, parse_markdown_references,
extract_fenced_blocks, parse_notes, rewrite_notes_file, HNSW build/build_batched,
CAGRA build/search/build_from_store, load_references, enumerate_files

Performance (2): FTS batch INSERT (190 rows/batch), count_stale_files delegates
to list_stale_files

Security (2): is_webhelp_dir rejects symlinks, SECURITY.md trust levels updated

Code quality (1): make_markdown_chunk helper deduplicates 3 Chunk construction sites

API design (1): SearchResult/NoteSearchResult use #[serde(flatten)]

Extensibility (2): named constants for name_match_score and chunk_importance

Test coverage (2): 4 edge case tests for extract_fenced_blocks, 3 unit tests for
build_risk_summary

Algorithm (1): token budget warning clarifies min-1 guarantee

Data safety (1): count_vectors acquires shared lock

Documentation (3): CLAUDE.md skills list, CHANGELOG unreleased, SECURITY.md trust

Platform (3): embedder stub comment, CRLF precondition doc, read.rs path doc

Resource (1): watch mtime cache with_capacity + bounded growth comment

6 non-issues, 2 deferred (TC-5, TC-8 — low-value integration test gaps)

commit.message:
fix: skip dedup check on bundle-check calls so messages actually process

The dedup key was set on the first call, then the delayed bundle-check
call (same payload) hit the same dedup key and returned "duplicate"
without ever creating a lead or storing messages. Now dedup only runs
on external webhook calls, not internal bundle-check re-invocations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix incomplete UGC fetching with comprehensive catalog search

- Search 8 different category+sortType combinations to catch all items
- Add retry logic with backoff for rate-limited asset detail requests
- Batch thumbnail requests in groups of 50 to avoid API limits
- Process groups sequentially with 200ms delays between batches
- Small batch size (5) for asset details to prevent rate limiting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Change Auto Loader schema checkpoint path to avoid stale state

Use _checkpoints/schemas/ instead of _schemas/ to start fresh.
Previous checkpoints may cause DLT analysis failures.

commit.message:
feat: add rigging session state provider and wire display components (#407-410) (#508)

* feat: add rigging session state provider and wire all display components (#407, #408, #409, #410)

Create RiggingSessionContext following the MatrixSessionContext pattern to
provide ephemeral client-side rigging session state. Wire all five rigging
display components (RiggingSummaryDisplay, DroneNetworkDisplay,
JumpInControlDisplay, AutosoftManagerDisplay, VehicleActionsDisplay) to
live session state with interactive controls for drone slaving, jump-in/out,
VR mode switching, biofeedback tracking, autosoft sharing, and vehicle
action dice pools.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add E2E tests for rigging/drone system UI (#407, #408, #409, #410)

14 Playwright test cases covering all 16 manual verification steps:
- Panel visibility for rigger vs non-rigger characters
- Session lifecycle (start/end with state cleanup)
- Drone network (slave/release, individual/network commands)
- Jump-in controls (vehicle jump-in, VR mode toggle, biofeedback, force ejection)
- Autosoft management (share/unshare, effective resolution per drone)
- Vehicle actions (dice pools with VCR bonus when jumped in)

Also renders BaseCard id prop as HTML id attribute to enable E2E panel selection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: V5 — action masking (25D→13D) + release improvement

Remove 12 left-arm joints via RightArmOnlyWrapper, focusing exploration on
13 right-arm joints. Increase gamma 0.8→0.9 for better release reward
visibility, add ent_coef=0.001 for finger exploration, strengthen critic
(vf_coef=1.0), and extend training to 100M steps.

commit.message:
Add flavour profiles, URL deep links, expanded filters & more

Five improvements across the list view, sauce cards, and utilities:

FLAVOUR PROFILES
- FLAVOR_KEYWORDS map (7 profiles: Creamy, Rich, Tangy, Herby, Spicy,
  Umami, Sweet) auto-detected from ingredients + description + steps
- getSauceFlavorProfile() pure function, memoised per session via
  allFlavorProfiles useMemo — zero per-render cost for 546 sauces
- 1-2 flavour chips (warm amber style) on every SauceCard;
  1 chip on SauceRow
- Flavour filter row added below technique row; result count label
  updated; clear-filters and both dashboard conditions wired up

URL DEEP LINKING
- navigateTo() writes window.location.hash = id on every navigation
- Mount useEffect reads hash on load → opens that sauce directly
- Esc clears hash when returning to list
- Shareable/bookmarkable URLs: e.g. saucier.html#hollandaise

EXPANDED TECHNIQUE FILTER
- All 27 TECHNIQUE_KEYWORDS keys now shown (was 7)
- TECH_LABELS map provides proper French display names (Sauté, Flambé,
  Monter au Beurre, Beurre Manié, Déglacer, etc.)
- Result count description uses label not raw key

IMPROVED COPY SHOPPING LIST
- Now formats per-sauce (sauce name + ingredient lines)
- Uses addToast() for feedback instead of DOM mutation
- Includes header "Saucier — Shopping List" with separator

PRINT STYLES
- @media print CSS: hides .no-print elements (sticky header, panels)
- Body typography reset for clean print output
- Header div gets no-print class; sc cards lose box-shadow on print

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add missing type codecs: arrays, geometric types, macaddr8, money, xml, jsonpath, bit/varbit

New codecs (12): array (meta-codec wrapping element codecs), macaddr8, money, xml,
jsonpath, bit_string (bit/varbit), line, lseg, box, path, polygon, circle.
Array codec supports 1-D arrays for 24 element types via OID mapping.
Updated registry to use defaults.build_registry() for array post-registration.
Added 84 unit tests + 17 integration tests (495 total). Updated benchmarks.

feat: External Port 모드 구현 + veth-dut 테스트베드

## External Port 모드 (engine)

- `ns/veth.rs`: 정책 라우팅 프리미티브 추가
  - add_ip_rule / del_ip_rule (ip rule)
  - add_route_table_dev / flush_route_table (ip route table)

- `ns/port.rs`: External Port 모드 핵심 로직 구현
  - assign_ext_port_network(): upper/lower 인터페이스에 client/server IP 할당
  - setup_policy_routing(): DUT 우회 방지 정책 라우팅 설정
    - table 191: client CIDR → default dev upper_iface
    - table 192: server IP/32 → default dev lower_iface
  - teardown_policy_routing(): 시험 종료 시 rule/route 정리
  - setup_external_port()에서 불필요한 promisc 설정 제거

- `ns/lib.rs`: PolicyRoutingState / setup·teardown_policy_routing re-export

- `control/state.rs`: ext_policy_routing 필드 추가
- `control/orchestrator.rs`:
  - start_external_port_mode(): IP 할당 후 정책 라우팅 자동 설정
  - do_stop(): ExternalPort 모드 시험 종료 시 정책 라우팅 자동 정리

## 테스트베드

- `testbed/docker-dut/`: Docker 컨테이너를 DUT로 사용하는 셋업
  (WSL2 Docker Desktop 네트워크 제약으로 물리머신 권장)

- `testbed/veth-dut/`: veth pair + bridge로 단일 머신에서 External Port 모드 검증
  - veth-c0(upper) ↔ veth-c1 ──┐
                                 br-dut (L2 bridge)
    veth-s0(lower) ↔ veth-s1 ──┘
  - setup.sh: 토폴로지 생성 + 빌드 + net-meter 실행 (Ctrl+C 시 자동 정리)
  - teardown.sh: 비상 정리용
  - sudo env PATH="$PATH" ./setup.sh 으로 실행

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: harden tracker against mass GitHub API failures (#274)

* fix: increase tracker_permanent_failure_threshold from 3 to 10

A transient GitHub API outage lasting 30 minutes (3 cron ticks) was
enough to permanently disable all affected trackers. Raising to 10
gives ~100 minutes of tolerance before disabling.

Fixes part of #273

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add circuit breaker for mass tracker permanent failures

When >50% of resolved trackers return permanent errors in a single
batch, downgrade all to transient. This prevents a systemic GitHub API
issue from mass-disabling trackers. Configurable via
tracker_circuit_breaker_ratio setting (default: 0.5).

Fixes part of #273

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add trackers_disabled metric to tracker_metrics

The permanent-failure disabling path was invisible — the tick that
disabled 221 trackers showed trackers_failed=0. New trackers_disabled
counter tracks how many trackers were disabled per cron tick.

Fixes #273

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add circuit breaker comment, fix stale chunk-size test, update runbook

- Add comment explaining errored count includes circuit-breaker-downgraded IDs
- Fix test_first_chunk_fails_second_succeeds: used 251 repos (old chunk size 250)
  but _GRAPHQL_BATCH_CHUNK was reduced to 50 in PR #269, causing StopIteration
- Add circuit breaker and trackers_disabled queries to runbook

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(web): rewrite onboarding SDK snippets, fix billing plan cards, add vitest

Onboarding wizard (/dashboard/demo/onboarding):
- Rewrite all SDK snippets to match actual SDK APIs verified against
  source: Rust (allsource crate, CoreClient/QueryClient), Go
  (allsource-go, New/Ingest/Query), TypeScript (@allsource/client,
  ingestEvent/queryEvents with snake_case), Python (allsource-client,
  AllSourceClient)
- Remove fake private registry configs
- Add vitest test suite (30 tests): install commands, send/query
  snippets, step navigation, Run It/Try It API calls

Billing:
- Plan cards use tier ranking (free/growth/enterprise) for
  context-aware upgrade/downgrade/current buttons
- Free plan shows "Cancel via Manage Subscription" text instead of
  upgrade button when user is on a paid plan

Also adds Dialog, Select, Table, Tabs components to @allsource/ui.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 5 bugs: ghost speed, editor death, timer delay, impossible levels, longer levels

- Ghost replay now plays at correct speed (was 3x too fast due to recording
  every 3rd frame but playing back every frame)
- Editor test mode: dying no longer freezes the screen, auto-respawns after
  500ms by rebuilding the editor level instead of calling loadLevel(-1)
- Timer doesn't start until player presses a movement key
- All 15 levels completely redesigned: longer runs, all jumps physically
  possible (max jump height ~10 tiles respected), better stepping stones
  between platforms, wall pairs properly spaced for wall jumping
- Computer best runs auto-generated from level platform layout instead of
  manual waypoints, ensuring correct paths for new levels
- Grade thresholds updated for longer level times

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Cloudflare Worker + D1へのバックエンド移行

- worker/ ディレクトリに Hono + D1 Worker を追加
  - worker/src/index.ts: 全 API エンドポイント (HS256 JWT 認証)
  - worker/src/db.ts: D1 データアクセス層
  - worker/wrangler.toml: Cloudflare Worker 設定
- フロントエンドをWorker対応に更新
  - LoginPage.tsx: Supabase Auth → Worker /login エンドポイントに変更
  - api.ts: getAccessToken() を localStorage 優先に変更
  - info.tsx: VITE_API_URL 環境変数でWorker URLを設定可能に
- VITE_API_URL 未設定時は Supabase Edge Function にフォールバック

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Minecraft MCP サーバーに行動ツールを追加 (#80)

* feat: Minecraft MCP サーバーに行動ツール (follow_player/go_to/collect_block/stop) を追加

mineflayer-pathfinder を使用した 4 つのアクションツールを minecraft-actions.ts に実装。
- follow_player: GoalFollow で指定プレイヤーを動的追従
- go_to: GoalNear で指定座標へ移動
- collect_block: GoalGetToBlock + dig で指定ブロックを採集
- stop: pathfinder.stop() で全移動を停止

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: コードレビュー指摘事項を全件修正

- count パラメータに上限 64 を追加し、再帰をループに書き換え (DoS/スタックオーバーフロー防止)
- digOneBlock で移動後にブロックの存在を再検証 (他プレイヤーによる破壊に対応)
- bestHarvestTool で最適ツールを自動装備してから採掘
- follow_player で対象プレイヤーのログアウト時に自動停止 (playerLeft イベント監視)
- Movements を毎回生成せず ensureMovements で遅延初期化に変更
- docs/SPEC.md: 実装済みツールのステータスを更新、stop ツールを追加
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: 実装済みツールを記載、将来拡張リストから除外

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
